ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "treatment_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual received a specific intervention (treatment) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is black */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is married */,
  "no_degree" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has no degree */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is Hispanic */,
  "unemployed_1974" INTEGER /* Whether the individual was unemployed in 1974 */,
  "unemployed_1975" INTEGER /* Whether the individual was unemployed in 1975 */,
  "income_1974" REAL /* Income of the individual in 1974 */,
  "income_1975" REAL /* Income of the individual in 1975 */,
  "income_1978" REAL /* Income of the individual in 1978 */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "employment_status_1976" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual in 1976 */,
  "income_1976" REAL /* Income of the individual in 1976 */,
  "employment_status_1977" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual in 1977 */,
  "income_1977" REAL /* Income of the individual in 1977 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "region_of_birth" TEXT /* Region of birth of the individual */,
  "current_residence" TEXT /* Current residence of the individual */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious background of the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has any disabilities */,
  "military_service" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has served in the military */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employment record */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits provided by the employer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_details" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment or intervention */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "treatment_location" TEXT /* Location where the treatment was provided */,
  "treatment_provider" TEXT /* Name of the treatment provider */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "treatment_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_details_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the changes made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
